name: MARINUS PHARMACEUTICALS INC
summary: MARINUS PHARMACEUTICALS INC is a biopharmaceutical company dedicated to developing and commercializing innovative therapeutics to treat seizure disorders. Their lead product, ZTALMY (ganaxolone), is approved for the treatment of seizures associated with CDKL5 deficiency disorder (CDD). Marinus Pharmaceuticals is headquartered in Radnor, Pennsylvania.
